title: Verdemobility
subTitle: VerdeMobility operates to provide the next generation of innovative EV charging solutions with the future laid out for Electric Vehicles. A vision to power the future of human mobility with a full-fledged range of custom hardware and software EV charging infrastructure

title: EVRE
subTitle: Reimagining EV charging stations and solutions through our patented technology and Design. Actively building the largest and most logical network of chargers.

title: Varaha
subTitle: Varaha is a tech startup at the intersection of – climate, nature and technology. The startup uses technologies such as Remote sensing, Blockchain, Science-based quantification tools and models.

title: DN99
subTitle: DN99 is a non-profit organization founded by alumni of the Dadabhai Naoroji High School batch of 1999 in Anand, Gujarat. With more than 50 members DN99 has helped many lives and adopted 5 government schools, and it continues to grow with India.

title: Talati Easy Foods
subTitle: Talati easy foods in Indore manufactures quality food and beverages. This project was to create a digital identitfy for them and to showcase their projects.

title: Gavyam Gentech
subTitle: Gavyam is working to make farmer's lives better through digitalization in reproduction sector and thereby helping in better cattle management system to Milk Unions as well along with farmers.
